text:
SELECT
    u.id,
    u.email,
    COUNT(o.id) AS order_count,
    SUM(o.total_cents) / 100.0 AS lifetime_value
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o
    ON o.user_id = u.id
    AND o.status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'refunded')
WHERE u.created_at >= DATE '2025-01-01'
GROUP BY u.id, u.email
HAVING COUNT(o.id) >= 3
ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC
LIMIT 50;

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

USAGE="usage: $0 <input_dir> <output_dir>"
INPUT_DIR="${1:?$USAGE}"
OUTPUT_DIR="${2:?$USAGE}"

mkdir -p "$OUTPUT_DIR"

find "$INPUT_DIR" -name '*.log' -mtime -7 | while read -r logfile; do
    base="$(basename "$logfile" .log)"
    grep -E 'ERROR|FATAL' "$logfile" | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn \
        > "$OUTPUT_DIR/${base}.errors.txt"
done

echo "processed $(find "$OUTPUT_DIR" -name '*.errors.txt' | wc -l) files"

services:
  api:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgres://app:secret@db:5432/app
      LOG_LEVEL: info
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U app"]
      interval: 5s
      retries: 5
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
volumes:
  pgdata:
